sensors.name: AN/SPY-1D
sensors.notes: Electronically scanned, no mechanical rotation needed
sensors.description: Passive electronically scanned phased array radar. Heart of the Aegis combat system. Simultaneous multi-target tracking and fire control.

sensors.name: AN/SPS-49
sensors.description: Long-range 2D air search radar. Rotating antenna. Primary air surveillance on non-Aegis and Aegis ships alike.

sensors.name: AN/SQS-53C
sensors.description: Hull-mounted active/passive sonar. Large bow dome. Primary ASW sensor on Spruance and Burke-class destroyers.

sensors.name: AN/SQS-56
sensors.description: Hull-mounted active/passive sonar for frigates. Smaller and lighter than SQS-53. Adequate for escort duties.

sensors.name: AN/BQS-15
sensors.description: Submarine bow-mounted sonar array. Large spherical array provides excellent passive detection. Part of BQQ-5 suite on Los Angeles-class.

sensors.name: AN/BQQ-5
sensors.description: Integrated submarine sonar suite. BQS-13 spherical bow array with BQR-15 towed array.

sensors.name: MGK-540 Skat-3
sensors.description: Soviet/Russian bow sonar array. Mounted on Akula and Udaloy classes. Cylindrical array with good passive performance.

sensors.name: Top Pair
sensors.description: Soviet 3D air search radar mounted on Kirov-class. Combination of Top Sail and Big Net antennas. Long range air surveillance.

sensors.name: Top Plate
sensors.description: Soviet 3D combined air and surface search radar. Back-to-back planar arrays. Mounted on Udaloy-class destroyers.

sensors.name: AN/SQR-19 TACTAS
sensors.description: Tactical Towed Array Sonar System. Passive only. Dramatically extends detection range by trailing behind own-ship noise. Most effective below 14 knots.

sensors.name: AN/AQS-13F Dipping Sonar
sensors.description: Helicopter dipping sonar. Lowered into the water on a cable. Active and passive modes. Short range but can be repositioned quickly.

sensors.name: AN/APS-137 ISAR
sensors.description: Maritime patrol aircraft search radar. Inverse Synthetic Aperture mode for ship classification. X-band for surface search.

sensors.name: VGS-3 Rys Dipping Sonar
sensors.description: Soviet helicopter dipping sonar. Lower performance than Western counterparts.

sensors.name: Commercial Navigation Radar
sensors.description: Standard commercial marine navigation radar. Short range, low power. No fire control capability.
